race.comment: WHEELY (5) has just missed in his two runs back from a spell, though the rise to 1300m now may be exactly what he's looking for. Third-up and ready to peak here for CJP, he should get every chance from the draw and with improvement on the cards, he'll be very hard to beat. JUST PETTY CASH (12) jumped favourite in the same race WHEELY comes through when beaten 2.3L. The wide draw this time is the issue, though his early speed is good and Steve Parnham replaces the apprentice hoop. Comes through what looks like the strongest formline and can make an impression. ABOUT TURN (4) jumped the equal fav over 1400m on the Scarpside here last time out and the slight drop in trip isn't an issue. Third-up now and should get every chance from the barrier. DIAMOND CHOUX (11) is racing in good order and put in a big figure over this trip at Belmont two back. THREE VIRGO'S (16) has to be included for the Pike and Team Williams combination on debut.
